title: Ironclad Workflow
description: Schema for an Ironclad Workflow resource — the in-progress contract authoring, negotiation, approval, and signature state machine surfaced by /workflows under the Ironclad Public API.

id.description: Unique identifier for the workflow instance.

title.description: Human-readable title for the workflow, typically derived from a workflow attribute or the configured workflow template.

template.description: Identifier of the workflow schema/template that this workflow instance was launched from.

templateVersion.description: Version of the workflow schema/template in effect when the workflow was launched.

status.description: Current step or phase in the workflow lifecycle (e.g., create, review, sign, complete).

step.description: Current step name within the workflow template.

created.description: Timestamp when the workflow was created.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the most recent change to the workflow.

isCancelled.description: Whether the workflow has been cancelled.

isComplete.description: Whether the workflow has completed all steps.

attributes.description: Free-form key/value map of workflow attribute values configured by the workflow template (counterparty, contract value, dates, custom fields).

approvals.description: List of approval roles and their current decision state.

roles.description: Map of role names to role assignment configuration.

signers.description: Configured signers on the active signature packet.

documents.description: Documents associated with the workflow — draft contracts, attachments, signed PDFs.

recipients.description: Counterparty recipient configuration for the negotiation phase.

key.description: Workflow attribute key for the document attribute.
